text: In the case of suspected fracture of the clavicle, emergency responders should use:

options.text: An arm sling supported with broad bandages.
A St. John tubular sling tied on the injured side.
A St. John tubular sling tied on the uninjured side.
Rigid splints to support the arm and support the shoulder.

explanation: For a suspected clavicle fracture, a St. John tubular sling or similar support is used to keep the arm close to the body, with the sling tied on the uninjured side to distribute weight across the back.
